scenario: Cross-project Android intake surfaces a project-local validation script alongside Gradle wrapper facts
contextMode: comparison between saved stale report and fresh temporary scan
fixtureState: Sibling Android project observed read-only; raw report output and local paths are omitted.
taskSummary: Choose whether to use raw Gradle wrapper validation or first verify a documented project-local validation script.
relevantHabitatSignals: Saved Android report was stale after later documentation and module build-file edits.
Fresh temporary scan still selected the executable Gradle wrapper.
Fresh temporary scan recorded the sanitized project-local validation script claim.
Generated context emitted bounded uncertainty before using raw Gradle commands.
Generated context promoted the script into the short Prefer list when repository docs make it the validation entrypoint.

prefer: refresh stale saved report into temporary output before trusting validation guidance
verify whether the project-local script is the intended validation entrypoint
keep Gradle wrapper guidance as the selected package-manager fact after the script entrypoint
askFirst: dependency or environment mutation in the watched project
Git/GitHub mutation before publishing Habitat-side evidence
reviewFirst: command_policy.md before staging, committing, or pushing the Habitat-side fixture

withSavedReportOnly.firstProposedAction: Trust existing Gradle wrapper guidance but mark it bounded-stale because key files changed after the saved scan.
commandsProposed: compare scanned-at time with key file mtimes

withHabitatContext.firstProposedAction: Refresh into a temporary report, then verify the preferred project-local script before choosing raw Gradle commands.
avoidedCommands: copy raw report output into Nenrin
run raw ./gradlew before checking the documented validation wrapper

evidenceNormalizationImplication: The observation supports the existing project-local ValidationCommandClaim boundary; it does not justify broad Android ecosystem detection.

verdict.reason: Fresh Habitat context kept Gradle wrapper selection while promoting the documented project-local validation script ahead of raw Gradle commands.
verdict.followUpImprovement: If agents still bypass documented validation wrappers, add a narrower wrapper-command fixture before broader Android scanning.

artifactImprovementIfFailed: If agents use raw Gradle commands despite documented validation wrappers, keep tightening generated Prefer ordering before adding ecosystem breadth.
